name: Brown Butter Blackberry Charlotte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter an 8-inch round, 3-inch deep baking dish.
3. Arrange lady fingers on the bottom and around the sides of the dish.
4. Fill with berries.
5. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, and flour until combined.
6. In a small saucepan, heat butter over medium heat until it foams and turns a nutty brown color.
7. Remove from heat and slowly pour the butter into the egg mixture, stirring continuously.
8. Add vanilla extract to the mixture.
9. Pour the mixture over the berries in the baking dish.
10. Place the dish on the middle rack of the oven preheated to 350°F.
11. Bake for 45 minutes or until the top is crusty and the inside is smooth but not runny.
12. Remove from the oven and let cool completely before serving.
13. To serve, invert the charlotte onto a plate and garnish with whipped cream.
14. This recipe can be frozen for up to 4 months.
